title: Restart failed containers in tests
body:
When we're waiting for a container to come up with healthchecks, and it's not even running, there's no point to waiting further. Instead, let's restart the container and continue waiting.

This may fix some flakes we're seeing with 'podman port' tests. Then again, all the tests there seem to fail, not just a single test flaking - so I bet there's some other underlying cause.

Three separate tests flaked. But none of them were the flake I was trying to fix... Progress?
